intro: The Lab (src/trading_bot/lab.py) is a long-running launchd daemon that reproduces and stress-tests strategies on historical data. Its goal is to push only statistically meaningful changes into the live config — and to refuse promotions that look good in-sample but fail honest out-of-sample tests.

components.name: Purged walk-forward
details: Default 6 folds — 12-month train + 3-month test, walking by test_months=3.
Embargo gap defaults to 5 calendar days in walk_forward_backtest (walkforward.py:197) — enough to break leakage from RSI(14)/MACD(26)/EMA(20) lookbacks.
FoldDefinition supports configurable embargo per call; production sets 5d explicitly.

components.name: Probability of Backtest Overfitting (PBO)
details: Implements Bailey & López de Prado 2014 CSCV (Combinatorially Symmetric Cross-Validation).
n_partitions = 10 → C(10, 5) = 252 IS/OOS combinations.
For each combination, picks the IS-Sharpe argmax and tests whether its OOS rank > N/2.
Returns the fraction of combinations where the IS-best is below median OOS — promotion gate: PBO > 0.5 BLOCKS.

components.name: Deflated Sharpe Ratio (DSR)
details: Implements Bailey & López de Prado 2014 — penalises Sharpe by the number of trials and the higher moments of returns.
sharpe_max_estimate = (1 − γ)·Φ⁻¹(1 − 1/N) + γ·Φ⁻¹(1 − 1/(N·e)) with γ ≈ 0.5772 (Euler-Mascheroni).
z = (SR_obs − SR_max) · √(n−1) / √(1 − skew·SR + (kurt−1)/4 · SR²) → return Φ(z).
Pure-Python normal CDF / inv-CDF — no scipy dependency. Promotion gate: DSR > 0.95.

components.name: Optuna TPE evolution
details: optuna.create_study(direction='maximize', sampler=TPESampler()) — n_trials=100, 4-hour SLA budget per run.
Search space (param_space.py): rsi_lower (50–60), rsi_upper (65–75), ema_period (15–30 int), stop_pct (3.0–7.0), sentiment_floor (−1.0–0.0).
Each trial calls BacktestEngineerRole over a 31-month window with n_folds=6.
Fitness = compute_fitness(alpha_vs_spy_x, sortino, max_dd_pct) — combines all three into one scalar.

components.name: Calibration drift
details: Spearman rank correlation (Pearson on ranks) between predicted edge and realised P&L.
Severity bands: > 0.5 ok · 0.3–0.5 warning · < 0.3 high → halt Promoter for 7 days.
Below 10 samples → 'insufficient_data', no halt.

components.name: Architect / Reviewer pipeline
details: StrategyArchitectRole asks claude-opus-4-7 for 1–3 strategy templates as strict JSON (name, rationale, expected_regime, code, tests, params_to_search).
Hard constraints: no os/sys/subprocess/requests/eval/exec/open/__import__; must implement evaluate(symbol, ind, equity)→Signal and from_params classmethod.
AST-validated by ast_validator.py; CodeReviewer LLM second pass; only then does Optuna search over params_to_search.

promotion_gates.intro: Auto-promote (cron 02:45 ET) takes a candidate from lab_promotions and applies these gates in order. Any failure rejects.
rows: ≥ 4 of 6 with positive Sharpe and max-DD better than incumbent
≤ 0.5 — strictly less than 50% probability of being a lucky overfit
≥ 0.95 — significant after deflation by trial count and higher moments
Spearman ≥ 0.3 over a 50-trade window when prior data exists
max-DD ≤ incumbent_max_dd × 1.10 (no worse than 10% looser drawdown)
claude-opus-4-7 reviewer must return APPROVED in strict JSON
Optuna TPE search over each enabled strategy's params space
Apply the promotion gates above; on success update strategy_active.json
Compute Spearman drift on the trailing 50 trades; halt promoter if < 0.3
Architect → Reviewer → Optuna → walk-forward → promotion candidate
